    apply ContDiffOn.inv‚āÄ h4

  have h6 : ContDiffOn ‚ĄĚ ‚ąě (fun z : ‚Ąā => (ŌÜ‚āÄ'' z : ‚Ąā)) ‚Ąć‚āÄ := by
    -- Assuming ŌÜ‚āÄ'' is smooth on the upper half-plane, we can use it directly.

have h1 : ContDiffOn ‚ĄĚ ‚ąě (fun z : ‚Ąā => (-1 : ‚Ąā) / (z + 1)) ‚Ąć‚āÄ := by
    -- Prove that (-1 : ‚Ąā) / (z + 1) is smooth on ‚Ąć‚āÄ
    apply ContDiffOn.div
    ¬∑ exact contDiffOn_const
    ¬∑ apply ContDiffOn.add

      ¬∑ exact contDiffOn_const
    ¬∑ intro z hz

        -- Since z.im > 0, z + 1 cannot be zero
        intro h‚āĀ
        simp [Complex.ext_iff] at h‚āĀ
        <;>
        (try contradiction) <;>
